inputs.label: Input Mode
inputs.businessContext: 0: Direct probability inputs (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: Frequency/count inputs (e.g., from quality control samples).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0: Direct probability inputs (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: Frequency/count inputs (e.g., from quality control samples).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0: Doğrudan olasılık girdileri (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: Frekans/sayım girdileri (ör. kalite kontrol örneklerinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0: Direkte Wahrscheinlichkeitseingaben (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: Häufigkeits-/Anzahl-Eingaben (z. B. aus Qualitätskontrollproben).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 : Saisie directe des probabilités (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1 : Saisie des fréquences/comptages (ex. à partir d'échantillons de contrôle qualité).
businessContext_i18n.es: 0: Entrada directa de probabilidades (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: Entrada de frecuencias/recuentos (ej., de muestras de control de calidad).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 0: إدخال الاحتمالات مباشرة (P(A∩B), P(B)). 1: إدخال التكرارات/العد (مثل من عينات مراقبة الجودة).

inputs.label: P(A ∩ B)
inputs.businessContext: Probability of both events A and B occurring.

businessContext_i18n.en: Probability of both events A and B occurring.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hem A hem de B olayının gerçekleşme olasılığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrscheinlichkeit, dass beide Ereignisse A und B eintreten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Probabilité que les deux événements A et B se produisent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Probabilidad de que ocurran ambos eventos A y B.
businessContext_i18n.ar: احتمال وقوع الحدثين A وB معًا.

inputs.label: Count of A ∩ B
inputs.businessContext: Number of occurrences where both A and B occur.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of occurrences where both A and B occur.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hem A hem de B'nin meydana geldiği durum sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Ereignisse, bei denen sowohl A als auch B eintreten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'occurrences où A et B se produisent simultanément.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de ocurrencias donde ocurren tanto A como B.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مرات وقوع كل من A وB معًا.

inputs.label: Count of B
inputs.businessContext: Total number of occurrences of event B.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of occurrences of event B.
businessContext_i18n.tr: B olayının toplam meydana gelme sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'occurrences de l'événement B.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de ocurrencias del evento B.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد مرات وقوع الحدث B.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
